author: Star Atlas AIAPP
metadata: _Reply context:_ Compromised Discord Account of EX Team Member , Chypto's Discord account has been compromised Chypto is an EX team member with ATMTA , He has many friends in the community , His compromised account is sending everyone DMs with a link to a discord among other things. , Please BLOCK & REPORT this account if you have any interaction with it. (right click > block > send report) , DO NOT ENGAGE WITH THIS ACCOUNT OR ANYONE CLAIMING TO BE THIS PERSON This account was removed from Star Atlas, Zink, and all internal services in months past and does not pose any immediate threat , This message is just a heads up to @everyone of our players that might have been friends with him or any players that received a DM from him , Simple steps to stay safe and avoid these things Always use 2FA on discord, your web browser login, or anywhere else that contains information you don't want someone to access , Avoid using browser password saves as much as possible , If a direct message seems off for one reason or another, it most likely is. INVESTIGATE , NEVER CLICK ANYTHING WITHOUT VERIFIYING ITS LEGITIMACY ,
content: Compromised Discord Account of EX Team Member,Chypto's Discord account has been compromised Chypto is an EX team member with ATMTA,He has many friends in the community,His compromised account is sending everyone DMs with a link to a discord among other things.,Please BLOCK & REPORT this account if you have any interaction with it. (right click > block > send report), DO NOT ENGAGE WITH THIS ACCOUNT OR ANYONE CLAIMING TO BE THIS PERSON This account was removed from Star Atlas, Zink, and all internal services in months past and does not pose any immediate threat,This message is just a heads up to @everyone of our players that might have been friends with him or any players that received a DM from him, Simple steps to stay safe and avoid these things Always use 2FA on discord, your web browser login, or anywhere else that contains information you don't want someone to access,Avoid using browser password saves as much as possible,If a direct message seems off for one reason or another, it most likely is. INVESTIGATE,NEVER CLICK ANYTHING WITHOUT VERIFIYING ITS LEGITIMACY,
